moments.title: Commonwealth Games Glasgow 2026 Begins
moments.blurb: The XXII Commonwealth Games officially kicks off in Glasgow tomorrow, bringing together athletes from across the Commonwealth for 11 days of sporting action.

angles.name: Opening Ceremony Excitement
angles.copy: Glasgow gets ready to host the Commonwealth Games! The opening ceremony is tomorrow, bringing the world to Scotland's doorstep. Who are you backing for gold?

angles.name: Team Spirit
angles.copy: Team England, Scotland, Wales, Northern Ireland – let's go! The Commonwealth Games start tomorrow, and we're ready for some incredible sporting moments.

moments.title: Love Island 2026 Final
moments.blurb: The Love Island 2026 summer series concludes on Monday, July 27th, with one couple crowned the winners and taking home the £50,000 prize.

angles.name: Who will win?
angles.copy: It all comes down to this! The Love Island 2026 final is Monday. After weeks of drama, romance, and 'I've got a text!', who do you think deserves to win?

angles.name: Final preparations
angles.copy: The villa is buzzing with final dates and declarations! Get ready for the Love Island 2026 final on Monday night. What's been your favourite moment this series?

moments.title: Tour de France 2026 Grand Finale
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France culminates this Sunday, July 26th, with the iconic final stage on the Champs-Élysées in Paris.

angles.name: Yellow Jersey countdown
angles.copy: The yellow jersey is almost decided! The Tour de France reaches its climax this Sunday in Paris. Who will be standing on the top step of the podium?

angles.name: Final sprint
angles.copy: After thousands of kilometres, it all comes down to the final stages of the Tour de France. Get ready for the sprint finish on the Champs-Élysées this weekend!

moments.title: Don Henley Turns 79
moments.blurb: Donald Hugh Henley, best known as a founding member, drummer, and lead vocalist of the Eagles, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Eagles Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to Eagles legend Don Henley! From 'Hotel California' to 'The Boys of Summer,' his voice defined an era. What's your favourite Don Henley track?

angles.name: Timeless Talent
angles.copy: Celebrating 79 years of timeless talent! Don Henley, the voice behind so many iconic hits, is celebrating his birthday today. What a career!

moments.title: Latitude Festival 2026
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23rd to 26th, featuring a diverse lineup of music, comedy, and arts.

angles.name: Festival Gates Open
angles.copy: Latitude Festival kicks off tomorrow! Henham Park is about to come alive with incredible music, comedy, and arts. Who are you most excited to see?

angles.name: Suffolk's Big Weekend
angles.copy: Suffolk is the place to be this weekend! Latitude Festival brings its unique blend of culture and good vibes starting tomorrow. Are you heading there?

moments.title: Truck Festival 2026
moments.blurb: Truck Festival, Oxfordshire's longest-running independent music festival, runs from July 23rd to 26th with a lineup of indie and rock acts.

angles.name: Indie Fest Begins
angles.copy: Get ready for a weekend of indie anthems! Truck Festival starts tomorrow in Oxfordshire. Who's got their wellies packed?

angles.name: Summer Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Another amazing UK festival kicks off tomorrow! Truck Festival brings the best in indie and rock to Oxfordshire. Good vibes guaranteed!

moments.title: Rock Oyster Festival 2026
moments.blurb: The Rock Oyster Festival returns to the Cornish coast from July 23rd to 26th, combining music, food, and family entertainment.

angles.name: Cornwall Calling
angles.copy: Cornwall's Rock Oyster Festival starts tomorrow! Sun, sea, tunes, and incredible food. Who's heading to the coast for this one?

angles.name: Coastal Festival Fun
angles.copy: More festival fun kicks off tomorrow! Rock Oyster Festival brings a unique blend of music and culinary delights to Cornwall. Sounds delicious!

moments.title: Depot In The Castle 2026
moments.blurb: Depot In The Castle returns to Cardiff Castle on July 25th, promising a day of live music in a historic setting.

angles.name: Cardiff Castle Sounds
angles.copy: Cardiff Castle is ready to rock! Depot In The Castle takes over this Saturday with a fantastic lineup. Who's got their tickets for a day of live music?

angles.name: Welsh Festival Fun
angles.copy: Hitting Cardiff this weekend! Depot In The Castle brings a huge party to the historic castle grounds on Saturday. Don't miss out!

moments.title: AIG Women's Open 2026
moments.blurb: The AIG Women's Open, one of golf's major championships, tees off at Royal Lytham & St Annes from July 29th to August 2nd.

angles.name: Major Golf Action
angles.copy: The world's best women golfers head to Royal Lytham & St Annes next week for the AIG Women's Open! Who are your picks for the championship?

angles.name: Lancashire Links
angles.copy: Major golf is coming to Lancashire! The AIG Women's Open starts July 29th. Get ready for some incredible action on the greens.

moments.title: Geddy Lee Turns 73
moments.blurb: Geddy Lee, the iconic lead vocalist, bassist, and keyboardist for legendary progressive rock band Rush, celebrates his 73rd birthday on July 29th.

angles.name: Rush Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 73rd birthday to the incredible Geddy Lee of Rush on July 29th! His distinctive voice and bass lines are legendary. What's your favourite Rush song?

angles.name: Prog Rock Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating a true prog rock icon next week! Geddy Lee turns 73 on July 29th. His influence on music is undeniable. Crank up some Rush!

moments.title: Paul Anka Turns 85
moments.blurb: Canadian-American singer, songwriter, and actor Paul Anka, known for hits like 'Diana' and 'My Way,' celebrates his 85th birthday on July 30th.

angles.name: Music Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 85th birthday to the legendary Paul Anka next week on July 30th! A true showman with a career spanning decades. What's your favourite of his classics?

angles.name: Timeless Crooner
angles.copy: From teen idol to writing 'My Way,' Paul Anka turns 85 next Thursday! Celebrate his incredible career by listening to some of his timeless tracks.

moments.title: Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival 2026
moments.blurb: The Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival returns to the Scottish Highlands from July 30th to August 1st, promising a weekend of music and arts.

angles.name: Highland Festival
angles.copy: Get ready for the Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival next week! The Scottish Highlands will be buzzing with music, arts, and family fun from July 30th.

angles.name: Scottish Summer Sounds
angles.copy: One of Scotland's most beloved festivals, Belladrum, kicks off next Thursday! Who's making the trip to the Highlands for the Tartan Heart fun?

moments.title: Camp Bestival Dorset 2026
moments.blurb: Camp Bestival returns to Lulworth Castle, Dorset, from July 30th to August 2nd, offering a family-friendly festival experience with music, activities, and entertainment.

angles.name: Family Festival Fun
angles.copy: Camp Bestival Dorset kicks off next week! Lulworth Castle is ready for four days of family-friendly fun, music, and adventure. Who's heading down?

angles.name: Dorset Delights
angles.copy: Dorset's ready for Camp Bestival! Starting July 30th, it's the perfect summer escape for families. What's your favourite festival activity?

moments.title: Y-Not Festival 2026
moments.blurb: Y-Not Festival returns to Pikehall, Derbyshire, from July 30th to August 2nd, with a lineup of indie, rock, and alternative acts.

angles.name: Derbyshire Rocks
angles.copy: Y-Not Festival is back next week! Pikehall, Derbyshire, is about to host four days of incredible indie and rock. Who's got their tickets?

angles.name: Peak District Party
angles.copy: Ready for a party in the Peak District? Y-Not Festival kicks off next Thursday, July 30th. Get set for some amazing live music!

moments.title: UK Summer Weather Continues
moments.blurb: After a period of heatwaves, the UK's summer weather continues with temperatures generally above average, and further warm spells expected.

angles.name: Sunshine & Showers
angles.copy: It's still peak summer in the UK! While the recent heat has eased, we're still seeing good temperatures and sunny spells across the nation. Perfect for enjoying the outdoors!

angles.name: Stay Cool
angles.copy: Keep cool and hydrated as summer continues! Temperatures remain above average for many. What are your favourite ways to beat the heat?
